message:
fix(layout): improve 404 viewport handling and add gitignore patterns

## app/not-found.tsx
- Change min-h-[80vh] to min-h-[min(80dvh,80vh)] for better mobile viewport handling
- dvh (dynamic viewport height) accounts for mobile browser chrome that
  shows/hides on scroll, preventing content from being hidden behind it
- min() fallback ensures compatibility with browsers lacking dvh support

## .gitignore additions
Added patterns for agent/compiler ephemeral files:
- a.out - compiled output
- .plan.md - agent planning files
- screenshots_for_diagnostics/ - diagnostic artifacts
- rustc-ice-*.txt - compiler crash reports
- reports/ - generated reports
- .agent-mail.yaml - agent config

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -870,14 +880,14 @@ export function RestartViz() {

Complex landscapes have many "traps" (local minima). CMA-ES handles this with IPOP: if it gets stuck, it restarts with a larger, more exploratory population.
